issue_title: Horizontal scrolling causes header to get misaligned with body
issue_body_preview: This is pretty easy to reproduce with the sticky example on the reactabular site by scrolling quickly to the right, then back to the left. The header gets misaligned with the body. Scrolling vertically realigns it so a possible hacky workaround is to programmatically force a vertical scroll to get i
test_description_zh: 在 Reactabular 的 sticky 表格示例中，快速水平滚动表格内容区域向右滚动到底，然后快速向左滚回起始位置，观察表头与表体列的对齐情况。
expected_result_zh: 水平滚动过程中及滚动结束后，表头列应始终与表体列保持完全对齐，不出现错位或偏移现象。
